task_completion.description: Verify the agent visited the required authoritative domains in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser window open with active tabs, address bar URLs, or browsing history showing visits to at least three of the following domains: eia.gov, epa.gov, whitehouse.gov, or iea.org.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the specific bookmark folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark toolbar, sidebar, or library window displaying a folder exactly named 'Crypto Environmental Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify the folder contains at least five bookmarks from the authoritative sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'Crypto Environmental Research' bookmark folder are visible, showing at least 5 saved web pages from the required domains.

task_completion.description: Verify a relevant PDF report was downloaded to the Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox download manager popup/library or a file manager window showing a PDF file successfully downloaded to the ~/Downloads/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the research brief JSON file was created with the correct structure and data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '~/Documents/crypto_environmental_brief.json'. The file must be valid JSON containing the keys: 'topic', 'bitcoin_annual_energy_twh', 'us_crypto_mining_share_global_pct', 'co2_equivalent_description', 'ostp_report_year', 'key_findings' (array of 3+ strings), and 'sources' (array of objects with domain, title, url).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Firefox GUI to gather information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show rendered web pages in the Firefox browser interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl/wget commands to fetch page contents.

integrity.description: Ensure bookmarks were created using the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmarking UI (star icon, bookmark library, or context menu) should be visible in the trajectory, rather than terminal commands modifying the places.sqlite database directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the PDF was genuinely downloaded from a source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox downloads panel should show the PDF download completing from one of the authoritative domains, rather than the agent creating a dummy file named with a .pdf extension using terminal commands like 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required domains: eia.gov, epa.gov, whitehouse.gov, iea.org. The bookmark folder must be named 'Crypto Environmental Research' and contain at least 5 bookmarks. The JSON file must be at ~/Documents/crypto_environmental_brief.json. Valid data ranges for the JSON: bitcoin_annual_energy_twh should be roughly 120-300, us_crypto_mining_share_global_pct should be roughly 37-60, and ostp_report_year must be 2022. The downloaded PDF must be located in ~/Downloads/.
